response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements achieved during the game's redevelopment. Although we have significantly increased the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces additional performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balance between these features.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that dictates how much "body fluid" can be stored in their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can accommodate up to 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release a variety of liquid substances during climax, with Dreamers expelling approximately 10-15ml per climax and Elder Things injecting 400-600ml into their partners.  

Picture #2 and #3 showcase the new cum and love juice visual effects. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes and instead activate dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy levels, and stamina. Certain character abilities, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 depict interactive body dynamics and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 present previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sexual scenarios. More details will be released in the upcoming month.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
